name: stdout
text:
Crochet pattern for a torus with major radius R =  4 minor radius r =  1.78255 and stitch dimensions  0.4 × 0.4 mm.
Row 0: Chain  35 and join into round. 1dc into each ch around.
Work the following stitch counts in subsequent rows. Increases made using 2dc in previous row dc spaces. 
Row  1 :  36  dc
Row  2 :  38  dc
Row  3 :  41  dc
Row  4 :  45  dc
Row  5 :  51  dc
Row  6 :  57  dc
Row  7 :  63  dc
Row  8 :  69  dc
Row  9 :  75  dc
Row  10 :  80  dc
Row  11 :  85  dc
Row  12 :  88  dc
Row  13 :  90  dc
Row  14 :  91  dc
This completes the upper half of the torus. For the lower half, turn work upside down and repeat rows 1 to  13 . Fill with stuffing and stitch around, weaving in ends as needed.
